2603.24541.title: SEGAR: Selective Enhancement for Generative Augmented Reality
2603.24541.paper_summary: Generative world models offer a compelling foundation for augmented-reality (AR) applications: by predicting future image sequences that incorporate deliberate visual edits, they enable temporally coherent, augmented future frames that can be computed ahead of time and cached, avoiding per-frame rendering from scratch in real time. In this work, we present SEGAR, a preliminary framework that combines a diffusion-based world model with a selective correction stage to support this vision. The world model generates augmented future frames with region-specific edits while preserving others, and the correction stage subsequently aligns safety-critical regions with real-world observations while preserving intended augmentations elsewhere. We demonstrate this pipeline in driving scenarios as a representative setting where semantic region structure is well defined and real-world feedback is readily available. We view this as an early step toward generative world models as practical AR infrastructure, where future frames can be generated, cached, and selectively corrected on demand.
2603.24541.paper_summary_zh: 生成式世界模型為增強現實（AR）應用提供了一個引人注目的基礎：通過預測未來的影像序列，這些序列包含故意的視覺編輯，它們能夠實現時間上連貫的增強未來幀，這些幀可以提前計算並緩存，避免在實時中從頭開始逐幀渲染。在這項工作中，我們提出了SEGAR，一個初步框架，將基於擴散的世界模型與選擇性校正階段結合，以支持這一願景。世界模型生成具有區域特定編輯的增強未來幀，同時保留其他部分，而校正階段隨後將安全關鍵區域與現實世界觀察對齊，同時保留其他地方的預期增強。我們在駕駛場景中展示了這一流程，這是一個語義區域結構明確且現實世界反饋 readily available 的代表性設置。我們將此視為朝著生成式世界模型作為實用 AR 基礎設施邁出的早期步驟，未來幀可以按需生成、緩存和選擇性校正。
2603.24541.author: Fanjun Bu et.al.
2603.24541.authors: Fanjun Bu, Chenyang Yuan, Hiroshi Yasuda
